ex: The situation is unprecedented in modern times.

C1.m_th: เปิดเผย
C1.m_en: to reveal something for the first time
ex: The Queen unveiled a plaque to mark the official opening of the hospital.

C1.m_th: ใกล้จะเกิดขึ้น
C1.m_en: about to happen or begin soon
ex: the upcoming presidential election

C1.m_th: เวอร์ชันใหม่หรือดีขึ้น
C1.m_en: an improved or newer version of a system or program
ex: instructions for installing an upgrade to the existing system
upgrade something We are constantly upgrading our software to meet customers' needs.

C1.m_th: สนับสนุน รักษา
C1.m_en: To support or maintain something firmly.
ex: We have a duty to uphold the law.

C1.m_th: บริษัท
C1.m_en: A company providing essential services like electricity or water.
ex: a privatized electricity utility

C1.m_th: ใช้งาน
C1.m_en: to use something for a useful purpose
ex: The Romans were the first to utilize concrete as a building material.

C1.m_th: สมบูรณ์, ทั้งหมด
C1.m_en: completely; entirely
ex: We're so utterly different from each other.

C1.m_th: พื้นที่อากาศน้อยหรือไม่มี
C1.m_en: A space with little or no air pressure.
ex: a vacuum pump (= one that creates a vacuum)

C1.m_th: ไม่ชัดเจน
C1.m_en: not clearly expressed or difficult to understand
ex: to have a vague impression/memory/recollection of something

C1.m_th: ความถูกต้อง ความชอบธรรม
C1.m_en: the quality of being valid or legally acceptable
ex: The period of validity of the agreement has expired.

C1.m_th: หายไป
C1.m_en: to disappear suddenly and completely
ex: He turned around and vanished into the house.

C1.m_th: เปลี่ยนแปลงได้, ปรับได้
C1.m_en: able to change or vary; adjustable factor
ex: variable temperatures
With so many variables, it is difficult to calculate the cost.

C1.m_th: หลากหลาย
C1.m_en: having many different types or forms
ex: varied opinions

C1.m_th: หลอดเลือด
C1.m_en: A tube carrying blood from the heart to the body.
ex: the jugular vein

C1.m_th: ความเสี่ยง
C1.m_en: An activity involving risk or uncertainty.
ex: A disastrous business venture lost him thousands of dollars.
They ventured nervously into the water.

C1.m_th: ใช้คำพูด
C1.m_en: expressed in words rather than in writing or signs
ex: The job applicant must have good verbal skills.

C1.m_th: คำวินิจฉัย
C1.m_en: A decision made by a judge or jury in a legal case.
ex: Has the jury reached a verdict?

C1.m_th: ตรวจสอบ ยืนยัน
C1.m_en: To check or confirm that something is true or correct.
ex: verify something We have no way of verifying his story.

C1.m_th: ประโยค บรรทัด
C1.m_en: A line or group of lines in a poem or song.
ex: in verse Most of the play is written in verse, but some of it is in prose.

C1.m_th: ต่อสู้, แข่งขัน
C1.m_en: used to show opposition or competition between two things
ex: It is France versus Brazil in the final.

C1.m_th: ภาชนะ
C1.m_en: a container for carrying liquids or gases
ex: to burst/rupture a blood vessel

C1.m_th: ผู้มีประสบการณ์
C1.m_en: a person with a lot of experience in a particular field
ex: the veteran American actor, Clint Eastwood

C1.m_th: ทำได้สำเร็จ
C1.m_en: able to succeed or be done successfully
ex: a viable option/proposition

C1.m_th: มีชีวิตชีวา
C1.m_en: full of energy and colour; lively and exciting
ex: a vibrant city

C1.m_th: สิ่งที่ผิดศีลธรรม หรือเป็นอันตราย
C1.m_en: A morally wrong or harmful activity or behavior.
ex: At the door were two plain-clothes detectives from the vice squad.

C1.m_th: โหดร้าย ทำลาย
C1.m_en: extremely cruel or harmful
ex: a vicious attack

C1.m_th: ชาวบ้าน
C1.m_en: a person living in a rural area
ex: Some of the villagers have lived here all their lives.

C1.m_th: ละเมิด
C1.m_en: to break a rule or law
ex: to violate international law

C1.m_th: การกระทำที่ขัดกฎหมาย
C1.m_en: an action that breaks a rule or law
ex: They were in open violation of the treaty.

C1.m_th: ความดี คุณธรรม
C1.m_en: moral goodness or excellence of character
ex: He led a life of virtue.

C1.m_th: เกี่ยวกับเสียง
C1.m_en: relating to the voice or sound
ex: vocal music

C1.m_th: สัญญา
C1.m_en: make a firm promise to do or not do something
ex: vow to do something She vowed never to speak to him again.

C1.m_th: ความเปราะบาง
C1.m_en: A state of being open to harm or damage
ex: the vulnerability of newborn babies to disease

C1.m_th: อ่อนแอ ไม่ปลอดภัย
C1.m_en: easily hurt or at risk of harm, physically or emotionally
ex: These offices are highly vulnerable to terrorist attack.

C1.m_th: แผนก, หอผู้ป่วย
C1.m_en: A part of a hospital for patients with a specific illness or treatment.
ex: a maternity/surgical/psychiatric/children’s ward

C1.m_th: โกดัง
C1.m_en: A large building used for storing goods, especially for a business.
ex: Police are investigating a fire at a furniture warehouse.

C1.m_th: การสู้รบ
C1.m_en: organized fighting between nations or groups
ex: air/naval/guerrilla warfare

C1.m_th: คำสั่งทางการอนุญาตให้ตำรวจจับหรือค้น
C1.m_en: An official order allowing police to arrest or search.
ex: an arrest warrant
warrant something Further investigation is clearly warranted.

C1.m_th: ทหาร ผู้สู้รบ
C1.m_en: A soldier who fights in battles, especially in ancient or legendary contexts.
ex: a warrior nation (= whose people are skilled in fighting)

C1.m_th: ทำให้ไม่แข็งแรง
C1.m_en: to make something less strong or powerful
ex: The team has been weakened by injury.

C1.m_th: ทอ
C1.m_en: To interlace threads or fibers to create fabric.
ex: weave A from B The baskets are woven from strips of willow.

C1.m_th: พืชรุกล้ำ
C1.m_en: A plant that grows where it is not wanted.
ex: The yard was overgrown with weeds.

C1.m_th: บ่อน้ำ
C1.m_en: a deep hole in the ground used for extracting water
ex: to dig/sink a well

C1.m_th: สุขภาพดี รู้สึกดี
C1.m_en: state of being healthy and happy
ex: emotional/physical/psychological well-being

C1.m_th: อะไรก็ได้
C1.m_en: anything or everything, regardless of specifics
ex: They received no help whatever.

C1.m_th: มากที่สุด
C1.m_en: to an extreme degree or completely
ex: They received no help whatsoever.

C1.m_th: ทำให้, ถูกทำให้
C1.m_en: in a way that is caused by or causes something
ex: They have introduced a new system whereby all employees must undergo regular training.

C1.m_th: แม้จะ, ขณะที่
C1.m_en: Although or while something is happening.
ex: In the UK it is illegal to drive whilst holding a mobile phone.

C1.m_th: ตี ตบ ฟาด
C1.m_en: to strike someone repeatedly with a whip
ex: He was taken back to the jail and soundly whipped.

C1.m_th: สมบูรณ์, ทั้งหมด
C1.m_en: completely; entirely
ex: wholly inappropriate behaviour

C1.m_th: ขยาย, ทำให้กว้างขึ้น
C1.m_en: to make something larger or broader.
ex: Her eyes widened in surprise.

C1.m_th: ภรรยาที่สามีเสียชีวิตแล้ว
C1.m_en: A woman whose husband has died
ex: She gets a widow’s pension.

C1.m_th: ความกว้าง
C1.m_en: The horizontal measurement of something from side to side
ex: The terrace runs the full width of the house.

C1.m_th: ความเต็มใจ ความกระตือรือร้น
C1.m_en: Readiness and eagerness to do something.
ex: Success in studying depends on a willingness to learn.

C1.m_th: เช็ด, ล้าง, ถู
C1.m_en: To remove liquid or dirt by rubbing or using a cloth.
ex: wipe something (on something) Please wipe your feet on the mat.

C1.m_th: ความฉลาด, ความเฉลียวฉลาด
C1.m_en: Sharp intelligence or cleverness
ex: to have a quick/sharp/dry/ready wit

C1.m_th: การถอนเงิน
C1.m_en: the act of removing money or assets from an account
ex: You can make withdrawals of up to $250 a day.

C1.m_th: การออกกำลังกาย
C1.m_en: a planned exercise routine to improve fitness
ex: She does a 20-minute workout every morning.

C1.m_th: ความเคารพ
C1.m_en: deep respect and admiration for someone or something
ex: an act/a place of worship
The Mayans built jungle pyramids to worship their gods.

C1.m_th: คุ้มค่า
C1.m_en: Deserving of time, effort, or money spent.
ex: It was in aid of a worthwhile cause (= a charity, etc.).

C1.m_th: สมควรได้รับการชื่นชม
C1.m_en: deserving praise or recognition
ex: Very few of his ideas are worthy of further attention.

C1.m_th: ตะโกน
C1.m_en: to shout something loudly
ex: yell (at somebody/something) He yelled at the other driver.

C1.m_th: ผลผลิต ผลได้
C1.m_en: Amount produced or obtained from a source.
ex: a high crop yield
Higher-rate deposit accounts yield good returns.

C1.m_th: คนหนุ่ม
C1.m_en: a young person
ex: The camp is for youngsters aged 8 to 14.
